requirement_topic.en: Product Safety — Household Heat Pumps (LVD / EN 60335-2-40) — Germany / EU
requirement_topic.zh: 产品安全——家用热泵（低压指令 / EN 60335-2-40）——德国/欧盟
requirement_topic.zht: 產品安全——家用熱泵（低壓指令 / EN 60335-2-40）——德國/歐盟

summary.en: Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU (implemented in Germany via Gerätesicherheitsgesetz/ProdSV framework, commonly referred to as GPSGV or 1. ProdSV) requires electrical safety compliance for heat pumps operating within 50–1000 V AC or 75–1500 V DC. Germany's grid is 230/400 V 50 Hz; electrical safety testing must reflect this supply. The harmonised standard EN 60335-2-40 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for electrical heat pumps, air-conditioners and dehumidifiers) covers insulation, overcurrent protection, earthing, and refrigerant-related electrical hazards. IEC 60335-2-40:2022 (Edition 4) is the current IEC edition; CENELEC adoption status should be verified at time of compliance assessment. DIN/DKE publishes DIN EN 60335-2-40 as the German standard adoption. VDE (Verband der Elektrotechnik) certification is a well-recognised voluntary mark in Germany that demonstrates LVD compliance but is not legally required in addition to CE marking.
summary.zh: 低压指令2014/35/EU（在德国通过《设备安全法》/产品安全条例框架实施，通称GPSGV或1. ProdSV）要求工作电压在50–1000 V AC或75–1500 V DC范围内的热泵满足电气安全要求。德国电网为230/400 V 50 Hz；电气安全测试须反映该供电条件。协调标准EN 60335-2-40（家用和类似用途电器安全——热泵、空调器和除湿机的特殊要求）涵盖绝缘、过流保护、接地及与制冷剂相关的电气危险。IEC 60335-2-40:2022（第4版）为现行IEC版本；合规评估时应核实CENELEC采标状态。DIN/DKE发布DIN EN 60335-2-40作为德国采标版本。VDE（德国电气技术联合会）认证是德国广泛认可的自愿标志，可证明低压指令合规，但在CE标志之外法律上并无强制要求。
summary.zht: 低壓指令2014/35/EU（在德國通過《設備安全法》/產品安全條例框架實施，通稱GPSGV或1. ProdSV）要求工作電壓在50–1000 V AC或75–1500 V DC範圍內的熱泵滿足電氣安全要求。德國電網為230/400 V 50 Hz；電氣安全測試須反映該供電條件。協調標準EN 60335-2-40（家用和類似用途電器安全——熱泵、空調器和除濕機的特殊要求）涵蓋絕緣、過流保護、接地及與制冷劑相關的電氣危險。IEC 60335-2-40:2022（第4版）為現行IEC版本；合規評估時應核實CENELEC採標狀態。DIN/DKE發布DIN EN 60335-2-40作為德國採標版本。VDE（德國電氣技術聯合會）認證是德國廣泛認可的自願標誌，可證明低壓指令合規，但在CE標誌之外法律上並無強制要求。

standards_or_laws: EN 60335-2-40 (harmonised standard — DIN EN 60335-2-40 German adoption)
VDE certification (voluntary — widely recognised in Germany)

summary.en: GB 4706.32-2012 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for heat pumps, air conditioners and dehumidifiers) is China's national adoption of IEC 60335-2-40:2005. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) includes testing to GB 4706.32. The Chinese standard is based on an earlier IEC edition and Chinese test reports under GB 4706.32 are not accepted as equivalent to EU/German LVD conformity.
summary.zh: GB 4706.32-2012（家用和类似用途电器安全——热泵、空调器和除湿机的特殊要求）是中国对IEC 60335-2-40:2005的国家采标。中国强制性产品认证（CCC）包括按GB 4706.32进行测试。该中国标准基于较旧的IEC版本，GB 4706.32下的中国测试报告不被视为等同于欧盟/德国低压指令合规。
summary.zht: GB 4706.32-2012（家用和類似用途電器安全——熱泵、空調器和除濕機的特殊要求）是中國對IEC 60335-2-40:2005的國家採標。中國強制性產品認證（CCC）包括按GB 4706.32進行測試。該中國標準基於較舊的IEC版本，GB 4706.32下的中國測試報告不被視為等同於歐盟/德國低壓指令合規。

gap.en: GB 4706.32-2012 is based on IEC 60335-2-40:2005 (older edition); the EU harmonised standard references a later edition. CCC certification under GB 4706.32 is not accepted as EU/German LVD conformity evidence. Re-testing to the applicable EN 60335-2-40 edition at an EU-accredited or recognised laboratory is required, using German supply voltage (230/400 V, 50 Hz). In Germany, obtaining VDE certification alongside CE marking is a common commercial practice that aids market acceptance among German buyers and distribution partners, even though it is not legally mandatory in addition to CE.
gap.zh: GB 4706.32-2012基于IEC 60335-2-40:2005（旧版本）；欧盟协调标准引用更新版本。基于GB 4706.32的CCC认证不被接受为欧盟/德国低压指令合规证明。需在欧盟认可实验室按适用版本EN 60335-2-40重新测试，使用德国供电电压（230/400 V，50 Hz）。在德国，除CE标志外取得VDE认证是常见商业做法，有助于获得德国买家和分销合作伙伴的市场认可，尽管在CE之外并无法律强制要求。
gap.zht: GB 4706.32-2012基於IEC 60335-2-40:2005（舊版本）；歐盟協調標準引用更新版本。基於GB 4706.32的CCC認證不被接受為歐盟/德國低壓指令合規證明。需在歐盟認可實驗室按適用版本EN 60335-2-40重新測試，使用德國供電電壓（230/400 V，50 Hz）。在德國，除CE標誌外取得VDE認證是常見商業做法，有助於獲得德國買家和分銷合作夥伴的市場認可，儘管在CE之外並無法律強制要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU LVD / German GPSGV CE marking required; VDE certification is voluntary but commercially advantageous in Germany)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (CCC certification required for domestic market)

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — re-testing to EN 60335-2-40 under EU LVD/GPSGV required at German grid voltage (230/400 V 50 Hz); GB 4706.32 CCC certification not accepted as equivalent; VDE certification is voluntary but widely expected by German market partners.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——需在德国电网电压（230/400 V 50 Hz）条件下按欧盟低压指令/GPSGV要求对EN 60335-2-40进行重新测试；GB 4706.32 CCC认证不被接受为等效；VDE认证属自愿性质，但德国市场合作伙伴普遍期望取得。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——需在德國電網電壓（230/400 V 50 Hz）條件下按歐盟低壓指令/GPSGV要求對EN 60335-2-40進行重新測試；GB 4706.32 CCC認證不被接受為等效；VDE認證屬自願性質，但德國市場合作夥伴普遍期望取得。

requirement_topic.en: Commercial/Industrial Heat Pump Safety — EN 14276 Pressure Accessories — Germany / EU
requirement_topic.zh: 商业/工业热泵安全——EN 14276压力附件——德国/欧盟
requirement_topic.zht: 商業/工業熱泵安全——EN 14276壓力附件——德國/歐盟

summary.en: For commercial and industrial heat pumps, Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU (implemented in Germany via 14. ProdSV) is the mandatory legal framework for vessels and piping that meet its pressure, volume, and fluid-group thresholds. EN 14276-1:2021 (vessels) and EN 14276-2:2021 (piping) are voluntary harmonised standards for refrigerating systems and heat pumps; applying them can support a presumption of conformity with relevant PED essential safety requirements. In Germany, TÜV SÜD, TÜV Rheinland, TÜV Nord, and DGUV-accredited inspection bodies are prominent in commercial heat-pump PED assessments. DGUV publishes occupational safety rules (BGV/DGUV Vorschrift) relevant to refrigerant handling during installation and maintenance.
summary.zh: 对于商业和工业热泵，压力设备指令2014/68/EU（在德国通过14. ProdSV实施）是适用于达到其压力、容积和流体组别阈值的容器和管道的强制性法律框架。EN 14276-1:2021（容器）和EN 14276-2:2021（管道）是制冷系统和热泵的自愿协调标准；采用这些标准可支持对相关PED基本安全要求的符合性推定。在德国，TÜV SÜD、TÜV莱茵、TÜV北德和DGUV认可检验机构在商业热泵PED评估中发挥重要作用。DGUV发布与安装和维护过程中制冷剂处理相关的职业安全规则（BGV/DGUV条例）。
summary.zht: 對於商業和工業熱泵，壓力設備指令2014/68/EU（在德國通過14. ProdSV實施）是適用於達到其壓力、容積和流體組別閾值的容器和管道的強制性法律框架。EN 14276-1:2021（容器）和EN 14276-2:2021（管道）是制冷系統和熱泵的自願協調標準；採用這些標準可支持對相關PED基本安全要求的符合性推定。在德國，TÜV SÜD、TÜV萊茵、TÜV北德和DGUV認可檢驗機構在商業熱泵PED評估中發揮重要作用。DGUV發布與安裝和維護過程中制冷劑處理相關的職業安全規則（BGV/DGUV條例）。

standards_or_laws: DGUV Vorschrift / BGV (German occupational safety rules for refrigerant handling)
TÜV SÜD / TÜV Rheinland / TÜV Nord (German Notified Bodies for PED)

summary.en: GB 150 series (Pressure vessels — design and manufacture) and TSG 21-2016 (Special Equipment Safety Technical Supervision Regulations for Boilers and Pressure Vessels, administered by SAMR/SELO) govern pressure vessels in China. The classification methodology, inspection regime, and registration requirements differ substantially from the EU PED and EN 14276 system. China has no equivalent to DGUV occupational safety rules for refrigerant handling at installation and maintenance stage.
summary.zh: GB 150系列（压力容器——设计与制造）和TSG 21-2016（锅炉和压力容器安全技术监察规程，由市监总局/特检院管理）管辖中国境内的压力容器。分类方法、检验制度和注册要求与欧盟PED和EN 14276体系存在实质性差异。中国没有等同于DGUV关于安装和维护阶段制冷剂处理职业安全规则的规定。
summary.zht: GB 150系列（壓力容器——設計與製造）和TSG 21-2016（鍋爐和壓力容器安全技術監察規程，由市監總局/特檢院管理）管轄中國境內的壓力容器。分類方法、檢驗制度和登記要求與歐盟PED和EN 14276體系存在實質性差異。中國沒有等同於DGUV關於安裝和維護階段制冷劑處理職業安全規則的規定。

gap.en: EU/German legal compliance must be assessed against PED/14. ProdSV for pressure equipment within scope. EN 14276 vessel and piping methods differ from Chinese GB 150/TSG 21 classification, inspection, and registration practice; using the voluntary EN 14276 route may require re-design, re-inspection, and Notified Body involvement (TÜV or DGUV-accredited body in Germany). DGUV occupational safety rules for refrigerant handling by German-licensed technicians add a further layer with no Chinese equivalent, applicable at installation and maintenance stage.
gap.zh: 对范围内的压力设备，欧盟/德国法律合规性须按PED/14. ProdSV评估。EN 14276关于容器和管道的方法与中国GB 150/TSG 21的分类、检验和注册做法不同；采用自愿EN 14276路径可能需要重新设计、重新检验并引入公告机构（德国为TÜV或DGUV认可机构）。德国持证技术人员制冷剂处理的DGUV职业安全规则在安装和维护阶段增加了一个无中国等效规定的额外层级。
gap.zht: 對範圍內的壓力設備，歐盟/德國法律合規性須按PED/14. ProdSV評估。EN 14276關於容器和管道的方法與中國GB 150/TSG 21的分類、檢驗和登記做法不同；採用自願EN 14276路徑可能需要重新設計、重新檢驗並引入公告機構（德國為TÜV或DGUV認可機構）。德國持證技術人員制冷劑處理的DGUV職業安全規則在安裝和維護階段增加了一個無中國等效規定的額外層級。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: PED/14. ProdSV applies where pressure/volume/fluid-group thresholds are met; DGUV occupational safety rules apply at German installation stage; EN 14276 is voluntary and may confer presumption of conformity; Chinese SELO/TSG certificates not recognised
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (GB 150 / TSG 21 / SELO registration for applicable pressure vessels)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — PED/14. ProdSV classification and conformity assessment (TÜV or DGUV-accredited body in Germany) drive the mandatory obligation; EN 14276 is a voluntary harmonised route to presumption of conformity; Chinese SELO/TSG certificates not recognised; DGUV occupational safety rules add German-specific installation-stage obligations with no Chinese equivalent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——PED/14. ProdSV分类和符合性评定（德国为TÜV或DGUV认可机构）构成强制性义务；EN 14276是取得符合性推定的自愿协调标准路径；中国特检院/TSG证书不被认可；DGUV职业安全规则增加了无中国等效规定的德国特定安装阶段义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——PED/14. ProdSV分類和符合性評定（德國為TÜV或DGUV認可機構）構成強制性義務；EN 14276是取得符合性推定的自願協調標準路徑；中國特檢院/TSG證書不被認可；DGUV職業安全規則增加了無中國等效規定的德國特定安裝階段義務。
